dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In the grand halls of the Eldrin Kingdom, life for a handmaiden like me, Lucia, is a tapestry of routine. Polishing silverware, mending gowns, serving tea...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And, of course, witnessing the endless parade of suitors vying for Princess Aurelia's hand.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: (thought) Another one. He looks like he's swallowed a whole jar of honey. Sweet, but ultimately sticky and unpleasant.

dialogue.speaker: Prince Alaric
dialogue.line: My lady Princess, my kingdom of Veridian offers not only vast emerald mines but also the unwavering loyalty of my people.

dialogue.speaker: Princess Aurelia
dialogue.line: How... fascinating, Prince Alaric. We shall consider your proposition.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: (thought) She says that to all of them. I wonder if she even remembers their names.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHISPERS

dialogue.speaker: Queen Seraphina
dialogue.line: Silence! We have one more suitor to present today. A most... unique candidate.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The heavy oak doors creaked open, and two guards struggled to push in a large, covered object.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CREAK... THUD

dialogue.speaker: Noble 1
dialogue.line: What in the blazes is that?

dialogue.speaker: Noble 2
dialogue.line: A new piece of furniture?

dialogue.speaker: Queen Seraphina
dialogue.line: This, my dear court, is the enchanted armor, Kian. A suitor crafted by the most powerful mages of the Eldrin line. He is designed for unwavering protection and loyalty.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The guards pulled back the cloth, revealing a magnificent suit of silver and gold armor, intricately engraved with ancient runes. It stood perfectly still, almost radiating a silent power.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GASPS

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: (thought) An armor? As a suitor? This is a new level of ridiculous, even for this court.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Seraphina
dialogue.line: Lucia! You will be assigned to Kian. You are to instruct him on the customs of the court and assist him in his duties as a suitor.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: Me, Your Majesty? But...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Seraphina
dialogue.line: No 'buts', handmaiden. Your quiet diligence makes you perfect for this delicate task. Now, take him to the west wing and begin.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With a sigh, I approached the armor. It felt... cold. And strangely heavy, even though it wasn't moving. This was going to be a long day.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANK... CLANK (as Lucia guides the armor)

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: Alright, Kian. This way. We'll start with the basics. Like, how to walk without sounding like a stampeding warhorse.

dialogue.speaker: Kian
dialogue.line: Query: 'Stampeding warhorse' is an undesirable auditory output for locomotion?

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: (thought) It spoke! I mean, I knew it could, but it's still jarring. And so... formal.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: Yes, Kian. Undesirable. We aim for 'graceful' or 'dignified'. Less 'about to flatten the royal gardener'.

dialogue.speaker: Kian
dialogue.line: Understood. Adjusting gait parameters for optimal 'graceful' and 'dignified' output. Primary objective: impress Princess Aurelia.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIRR (a soft internal sound from Kian)

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: Yes, that's the idea. So, first lesson: when addressing royalty, you bow. Not too low, not too shallow. Just enough to show respect.

dialogue.speaker: Kian
dialogue.line: Demonstrate.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: Alright, watch closely.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I performed a small, practiced curtsy, just as I'd done countless times for the Queen. Kian watched, his visor reflecting my image.

dialogue.speaker: Kian
dialogue.line: Replicating gesture.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANK-SCRAPE (Kian attempts to bow, stiffly)

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: Whoa! Careful! You almost took out that vase. It's less of a 'lurch forward' and more of a 'smooth bend'.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: (thought) This is going to be harder than I thought. He's not just armor; he's like a giant, very literal child. A very, very powerful child.

dialogue.speaker: Kian
dialogue.line: My apologies. Recalibrating. My purpose dictates efficient learning for successful suitor engagement.

dialogue.speaker: Lucia
dialogue.line: (thought) 'Efficient learning.' He sounded so earnest. There's something... disarming about him. He's not like the other suitors, all pretense and ambition. He just... is. And now, he's my responsibility.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As the afternoon light faded, casting long shadows across the west wing, I realized my life as a quiet handmaiden had just taken a very unexpected, and very metallic, turn.

summary: Lucia, a royal handmaiden, is tasked with guiding Kian, an enchanted suit of armor presented as a suitor for Princess Aurelia. She struggles with Kian's literal nature and his initial clumsiness, realizing her quiet life is about to become much more complicated.
